args.content:
# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

Based on the vacation itinerary for Hawaii (June 10-20, 2024), here is the recommended packing list:

## Clothing
- Swimwear (multiple sets for beach days)
- Beach cover-ups
- Casual outfits for daily wear
- Light jacket or sweater for cooler evenings
- Comfortable walking shoes
- Hiking shoes or boots for Diamond Head trail
- Sleepwear

## Activities & Gear
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Sunscreen (reef-safe)
- Sunglasses
- Hat or cap for sun protection
- Camera or smartphone for photos
- Waterproof phone case
- Reusable water bottle
- Daypack or beach bag

## Toiletries
- Travel-sized toiletries (shampoo, conditioner, body wash)
- Toothbrush and toothpaste
- Razor and shaving supplies
- Feminine hygiene products
- Medications (prescription and basic first aid)
- Insect repellent

## Documents & Essentials
- Passport (if required)
- Driver's license or ID
- Flight tickets/itinerary
- Hotel reservation details
- Credit cards and cash
- Travel insurance information
- Emergency contact information

## Electronics
- Phone and charger
- Camera and charger
- Universal power adapter (if needed)
- Headphones or earbuds

## Special Items for Activities
- Water shoes for kayaking
- Small towel or quick-dry travel towel
- Guidebook or downloaded maps
- Snacks for day trips
- Beach mat or towel

Have a wonderful vacation in Hawaii!

# Hawaii Vacation Packing List

Based on the vacation itinerary for Hawaii (June 10-20, 2024), here is the recommended packing list:

## Clothing

- Casual outfits for daily wear

- Hiking shoes or boots for Diamond Head trail
- Sleepwear

## Activities & Gear
